description_long: This is a large, rectangular outdoor playground set within a green, grassy area bordered by a gray pathway. The playground features multiple distinct play structures, including climbing frames, monkey bars, balance beams, and a central wooden platform. Blue metal bars and frames are distributed throughout, providing various climbing and hanging opportunities. The layout is linear, with equipment spaced along the length of the playground, and some areas are equipped with safety barriers or low fences. The surface appears to be a combination of grass and soft play material, with the play structures primarily constructed from metal and wood. The overall design is open and modern, suitable for children to engage in physical activity and play.
description: A large, linear playground with multiple blue metal climbing frames, monkey bars, and a central wooden platform set on a grassy area with a surrounding pathway. The design is open, modern, and features several distinct play structures.
description_view_0: A wide, frontal view showing the full length of the playground, with blue climbing frames and a central wooden platform visible.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the depth of the playground and the arrangement of play structures along its length.
description_view_2: A rear view displaying the opposite side of the playground, with the play equipment and platform visible from the back.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the linear arrangement and the distribution of climbing frames and platforms.
